title: Ownership Ledger
description: Optional repo-local ownership ledger for Agentic Workspace managed surfaces, authority surfaces, and host-repo subsystem boundaries.

schema_version.description: Version of the ownership ledger structure consumed by Agentic Workspace.

workspace.description: Workspace-level ownership metadata for the managed root and related manifest paths.

ownership_classes.description: Named ownership classes used by managed surface and authority entries.

additionalProperties.description: Human-readable explanation of an ownership class.

module_roots.description: Package-managed root paths owned by installed Agentic Workspace modules.

managed_surfaces.description: Package-managed files, globs, or directories that lifecycle checks can reason about.

fences.description: Explicit managed regions embedded inside repo-owned files.

authority_surfaces.description: Concern-to-surface authority declarations used to route edits, diagnostics, and compact ownership answers.

subsystems.description: Optional host-repo subsystem ownership declarations used for path-specific scope, proof, and escalation hints.

notes.description: Human-readable ledger notes; these are not used as routing authority.

module_root.description: A package-managed module root under the workspace managed area.

module.description: Module that owns the root path.

path.description: Repo-relative root path owned by the module.

ownership.description: Ownership class for the root path.

uninstall_policy.description: Lifecycle rule to apply when removing the module.

managed_surface.description: A package-managed path, glob, or file that lifecycle checks can inspect.

module.description: Module that owns the managed surface.

path.description: Repo-relative path or glob for the managed surface.

kind.description: Surface role, such as workflow contract or module root.

ownership.description: Ownership class for the managed surface.

uninstall_policy.description: Lifecycle rule to apply when removing the surface.

fence.description: A managed marker-delimited block inside a repo-owned file.

name.description: Stable identifier for the managed fence.

module.description: Module that owns the fenced block.

file.description: Repo-relative file containing the fenced block.

start.description: Start marker used to locate the managed block.

end.description: End marker used to locate the managed block.

ownership.description: Ownership class for the fenced block.

uninstall_policy.description: Lifecycle rule to apply when removing the fence.

authority_surface.description: A declaration that one surface is authoritative for a named concern.

concern.description: Concern or routing question this surface owns.

surface.description: Repo-relative path or fenced path that carries authority for the concern.

ownership.description: Ownership class for the authority surface.

authority.description: Authority level, such as primary, candidate, or fenced.

summary.description: Short explanation of what the surface decides.

subsystem.description: A host-repo subsystem boundary that helps agents reason about scope, proof, and escalation for matching paths.

id.description: Stable subsystem identifier used in ownership and proof projections.

paths.description: Repo-relative paths or globs owned by the subsystem.

owns.description: Concerns the subsystem is expected to own.

does_not_own.description: Adjacent concerns that should trigger caution or escalation instead of silent scope expansion.

proof.description: Repo-native validation commands that provide proof for changes in this subsystem.

escalate_when.description: Conditions that should cause an agent to ask for review, split work, or move to a stronger planning path.
